title: Citrusy Flaky Italian Chestnut Flatbread
description: A bright, citrus-infused flatbread studded with creamy chestnut spread, baked to a flaky golden perfection.
instructions: In a bowl, combine flour, yeast, and salt.
Add warm water and olive oil to dry mixture, mix until sticky dough forms.
Knead dough on a lightly floured surface for 6-8 minutes until smooth.
Place dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise in a warm spot for 45 minutes.
While dough rises, mash cooked chestnuts with a fork until smooth.
Add lemon zest, orange juice, rosemary, and pepper to chestnut mash, mix well.
Punch down the risen dough, roll it into a 30cm diameter circle.
Transfer dough to a pizza stone or parchment‑lined tray.
Spread the chestnut‑citrus mixture evenly over the dough.
Drizzle a little olive oil over the topping.
Bake in a preheated oven at 220°C for 12‑15 minutes until the crust is golden and flaky.
Remove from oven, let cool 5 minutes, slice, and serve warm.
